LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS TO STAY FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO POST BOND IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00. THE CURRENT RESTRAINING ORDER IS EXTENDED TO EXPIRE ON JULY 29, 2024. THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO TAKE EFFECT ONCE THE BOND HAS BEEN POSTED. ANY FURTHER PROCEEDINGS WITH RESPECT TO PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND TRO SHOULD BE NOTICED FOR JUDGE KARNOW IN DEPT. 611. COUNSEL ARE TO CONTACT JUDGE KARNOW'S CLERK IN DEPT. 611 TO ARRANGE FOR A DATE FOR AN EX PARTE HEARING OR NOTICED MOTION. (SEE SIGNED ORDER AND WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK, CLERK: W. TRUPEK;, COURT REPORTER: SHEILA PHAM, CSR#13293, VERITEX 415-274-9977 SFDEPO@VERITEX.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS TO STAY FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Morgan Cahill-Marsland, Esq., NIXON PEABODY LLP 415-984-8200 mcahillmarsland@nixonpeabody.com Attorneys for Plaintiff J. DENNIS BONNEY
TONY FRANCOIS,Esq., BRISCOE IVESTER & BAZEL LLP (415) 402-2700 tfrancois@briscoelaw.net
Attorneys for Defendant 1810 JACKSON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
(via Zoom)
Sheila Pham, CSR#13293, Veritex 415-274-9977 sfdepo@veritex.com Court reporter,

Hearing is held. ARGUED. Court and Counsel present discuss the issue of the bond.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts with modifications the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AGAINST DEFENDANTS TO STAY FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS.

Granted. Plaintiff is ordered to post bond in the amount of $500.00. The current restraining order is extended to expire on July 29, 2024. The Preliminary Injunction to take effect once the bond has been posted. Any further proceedings with respect to Preliminary Injunction and TRO should be noticed for Judge Karnow in Dept. 611. Counsel are to contact Judge Karnow's clerk in Dept. 611 to arrange for a date for an ex parte hearing or noticed motion.

(see signed order and Word Minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk, Clerk: W. Trupek;, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR#13293, Veritex 415-274-9977 sfdepo@veritex.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
